ab: Sqcuqi ku musa sapah pyasan ka mrbu da.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: Musa sapah pyasan cida pa, cmhungi ku madas kabang patas da.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: Ini ku adas ana manu qqiya.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: Smluhay muyas cida, msupu nami qmita patas ka tnhiqan muyas.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: Pnsung pnyasan cida, kbrxan ku na impicu mi ssurus ka tnhiqan muyas.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: Rmngaw knan ka mptusa, ‘‘Babaw da u knllu mtutuy caman, iya bay scuqi da!’’
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
